summary: Iteration 49: Verified 3 new features - Client History endpoint, Thank You template, and Website Admin services sync. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests confirmed all features working correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby warning in DialogContent (accessibility improvement)

passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (16/16 passed) ===
1. GET /api/clients/{client_id}/history - Returns 200 with correct structure
2. Client history response contains: client, total_visits, total_spent, loyalty_points, appointments, payments
3. Client history returns 404 for invalid client ID
4. Client history requires authentication (returns 403 without token)
5. GET /api/clients/{client_id}/whatsapp - Returns 200 with wa.me URL
6. WhatsApp endpoint returns 404 for invalid client ID
7. WhatsApp endpoint requires authentication
8. GET /api/reminders/thank-you-template - Returns 200 with text field
9. Thank you template contains {nome} placeholder for personalization
10. Thank you template requires authentication
11. GET /api/reminders/templates - Includes 'thank_you' template type
12. All templates have required fields: id, name, text, template_type
13. GET /api/clients/{client_id} - Returns client by ID
14. GET /api/clients - Returns list of clients
=== FRONTEND UI TESTS ===
15. Client History Dialog - Opens when clicking 'Storico' button on client card
16. Client History Dialog - Shows Visite, Totale Speso, Punti Fedeltà, Ultima Visita
17. Client History Dialog - Shows Appuntamenti section
18. WhatsApp button visible on client card
19. Reminders Page - Shows 4 template types with colored badges
20. Reminders Page - 'Ringraziamento Post-Incasso' template with green badge visible
21. Template creation dropdown includes 'Ringraziamento Post-Incasso' option
22. Gestione Sito -> Servizi tab shows 'Sincronizzazione Automatica' banner
23. Gestione Sito -> Servizi tab shows 'Gestisci Servizi' button
24. Gestione Sito -> Servizi tab shows 'Nessun servizio trovato' (expected in preview)
critical_code_review_comments: All 3 features implemented correctly and working as expected
Client history endpoint properly aggregates appointments, payments, and loyalty data
WhatsApp endpoint correctly normalizes Italian phone numbers (handles 0039, +39 prefixes)
Thank you template endpoint returns default template if none exists in DB
Reminders page correctly displays all 4 template types with appropriate color badges
Website admin services tab shows sync banner and links to services management
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test client 'Maria Rossi'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 verified 3 new features: 1) Client history endpoint at /api/clients/{id}/history returns appointments, payments, loyalty points. 2) Thank you template at /api/reminders/thank-you-template returns customizable post-checkout message. 3) Website admin services tab shows sync banner and services from gestionale. Test client 'Maria Rossi' (id: 691bcfd1-b8d1-4d43-b166-b9a6d4fcddea) has 0 visits/appointments in preview DB.

client_whatsapp_endpoint.returns: wa.me URL with normalized phone number
